g.text: your River Skater on the mat
lay the pieces on the mat
it's a puzzle, not a glue-up
Want it fixed one day? A dab of
glue works — but it's made to rebuild.
film of ponds and slow rivers.
trap air, so it never sinks.
· It feels ripples in the water
to find trapped insects to eat.
A Giant Insect World felt puzzle
build it · take it apart · build it again

svg.text: Print A4 landscape at 100% (actual size) · fold into 6 × 2 where the edge marks line up · cover = top half of row 2, column 5
